steps.title: Close the interruption
steps.content: The sentence opens an em dash interruption after "that": "that—through community involvement and scientific study—aim to bring adjutants back." The interruption must be closed before the main verb "aim" resumes.

steps.title: Reject mismatched punctuation
steps.content: Choice B uses a comma, Choice C uses a colon, and Choice D uses no punctuation, so none properly closes the em dash interruption. Matching the opening em dash keeps the parenthetical phrase bracketed and lets the sentence continue grammatically. The answer is A.
